citations.quote: Rent: £4,686.18 Total Rent (including £500 Advance Rent Payment) £28.23 Per Day
The subsequent monthly sums due will be shown on the rent schedule to be provided separately to the Tenant.
the Landlord will be entitled to issue a notice to quit this Tenancy Agreement
you remain financially liable for the Accommodation fees for the full period
Tenancy Start Date: 13 March 2026 Tenancy End Date: 25 August 2026

findings.text: Total rent for the tenancy period (13 Mar 2026 – 25 Aug 2026) is £4,686.18, including a £500 advance payment.
The tenancy agreement states a rent schedule will be provided separately; no such schedule is in the provided source.
The landlord may issue a 28-day notice to quit if rent arrears reach two monthly instalments.
A 2% discount is available for early full payment; tenants remain liable for full fees if they vacate early.

proposed_artifacts.content:
## Rent Schedule and Payment Records Search

### Source Reviewed
- **NAP-SRC-0010**: Student Licence Agreement for Miss Anfal Elbushra (Castlelaw House).

### Key Findings
1. Total rent £4,686.18 for 13 Mar 2026 – 25 Aug 2026; £500 advance rent payment acknowledged.
2. Rent schedule promised separately (clause 2(a)) – **not included** in this source.
3. No payment records, receipts, or arrears statements found in this source.
4. Notice-to-quit provision for arrears of two monthly instalments (clause 2(b)).

### Gaps
- The actual rent schedule (monthly instalment amounts and due dates) is missing.
- No evidence of payments made or arrears accrued.
- No correspondence or financial statements attached.

### Recommendation
Search for separate rent schedule documents and payment records in other sources (e.g., correspondence, financial records).
proposed_artifacts.title: Evidence Map: Rent Schedule and Payment Records

proposed_tasks.instructions: Search for rent schedule documents, payment receipts, and arrears correspondence in sources of type 'correspondence' and 'financial' within matter napier-accommodation-arrears. Identify any documents showing monthly instalment amounts, due dates, payments made, or arrears balances.
proposed_tasks.title: Search for rent schedule and payment records in correspondence and financial sources

risk_flags.text: Rent schedule referenced in clause 2(a) is not present in the provided source; may affect calculation of arrears.

summary: Reviewed NAP-SRC-0010 (Student Licence Agreement). Total rent £4,686.18 for 13 Mar–25 Aug 2026, with £500 advance payment. Rent schedule promised separately but not included. No payment records or arrears evidence in this source. Proposed follow-up task to search correspondence and financial sources for the rent schedule and payment history.

uncertainties.text: The rent schedule with monthly instalment amounts and due dates is not present in the provided source; actual payment obligations are unconfirmed.
